author: Rosetta Zidian Guo
description: Give table columns a type — checkbox, select, date, currency, percentage — with inline controls in Live Preview and Reading view. Stays a plain pipe table on disk. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: fyaic
manifest.description: Give Markdown table columns a type — checkbox, select, date, currency, percentage — with inline controls in Live Preview and Reading view. Stays a plain pipe table on disk.
manifest.name: Table Fields

name: Table Fields

releases.author: rosetta-guo-fyaic
releases.description: Table Fields 0.1.0 — typed, interactive columns (checkbox, select, date, currency, percentage) for plain Markdown tables, in Live Preview and Reading view. Right-click a column header to set its type. Settings include a copy-paste AI skill. Free and fully local (see PRIVACY.md).
